ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loan_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan application */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "coapplicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coapplicant (if applicable) */,
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan type */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of loan requested */,
  "loan_term" INTEGER /* Term of the loan in months */,
  "credit_history" INTEGER /* Credit history score of the applicant */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographical area */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application status */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "application_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the application was submitted (e.g., online, partner organization) */,
  "loan_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan (e.g., home purchase, business expansion) */,
  "application_score" INTEGER /* Score representing the overall creditworthiness of the applicant */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date when the final decision was made */,
  "next_action_date" TEXT /* Date by which the next action is expected */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan officer or underwriter reviewing the application */,
  "communication_log" TEXT /* Log of communications between applicants and loan officers */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status of the application with regulatory requirements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES application_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_loan_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_type_id") REFERENCES loan_types ("loan_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_applications_coapplicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("coapplicant_id") REFERENCES coapplicants ("coapplicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the applicant */,
  "married" TEXT /* Marital status of the applicant */,
  "dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level */,
  "self_employed" TEXT /* Self-employment status */,
  "applicant_income" REAL /* Annual income of the applicant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the applicant */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number (or equivalent) of the applicant */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status of the applicant */,
  "employment_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the applicant's current employment */,
  "previous_loan_history" TEXT /* Information about the applicant's previous loan history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coapplicants" (
  "coapplicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coapplicant */,
  "coapplicant_income" REAL /* Annual income of the coapplicant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coapplicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coapplicant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the coapplicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the coapplicant */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Social Security Number (or equivalent) of the coapplicant */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status of the coapplicant */,
  "employment_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the coapplicant's current employment */,
  "previous_loan_history" TEXT /* Information about the coapplicant's previous loan history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coapplicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_types" (
  "loan_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan type */,
  "loan_name" TEXT /* Name of the loan type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loan type */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate for the loan type */,
  "minimum_loan_amount" REAL /* Minimum loan amount for the loan type */,
  "maximum_loan_amount" REAL /* Maximum loan amount for the loan type */,
  "minimum_loan_term" INTEGER /* Minimum loan term for the loan type */,
  "maximum_loan_term" INTEGER /* Maximum loan term for the loan type */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the loan type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical area */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the geographical area */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income of the area */,
  "credit_score_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of credit scores in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the application status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the application status */,
  "next_action" TEXT /* Next action required for the application in this status */,
  "expected_processing_time" TEXT /* Expected processing time for applications in this status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)
